canonical_definition: A transformer-based model used for Natural Language Inference (NLI) to quantify the probability that two persona-based narratives about the same event contradict each other.

definitions.text: A transformer-based model used for Natural Language Inference (NLI) to quantify the probability that two persona-based narratives about the same event contradict each other.
RoBERTa-large-MNLI, a pretrained natural language inference model used in the paper's analysis pipeline.

characterization: A transformer-based model used for Natural Language Inference (NLI) to quantify the probability that two persona-based narratives about the same event contradict each other.
